name: Cabbage and Lamb Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 pound lamb sausage, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 pound red skinned potatoes, cut into 1/2-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large sauce pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the onions and cabbage to the pot. Cook, stirring occasionally, for about 10 minutes, or until the onions are golden brown and the cabbage has wilted.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Add the sausage, garlic, bay leaves, and mustard. Sauté for 2 more minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Add the potatoes and chicken stock. Increase the heat to bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce it to a simmer.
6. Stir in the basil. Simmer for 30 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
7. Remove the bay leaves from the stew. Adjust the seasonings if needed.
8. Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped chives, alongside crusty bread.
Yield: 6-8 servings
